changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE ad_assets ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, url TEXT NOT NULL,
provider VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, ad_account_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, asset_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, mime_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, size_bytes BIGINT NOT NULL, original_filename VARCHAR(255),
page_id BIGINT NULL, stored_asset_id BIGINT NOT NULL, stored_variant_id BIGINT NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
CONSTRAINT fk_ad_assets_page FOREIGN KEY (page_id) REFERENCES pages(id), CONSTRAINT fk_ad_assets_stored_asset FOREIGN KEY (stored_asset_id) REFERENCES stored_assets(id), CONSTRAINT fk_ad_assets_stored_variant FOREIGN KEY (stored_variant_id) REFERENCES stored_asset_variants(id), CONSTRAINT fk_ad_assets_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
CONSTRAINT uk_ad_assets_user_provider_account_hash UNIQUE (user_id, provider, ad_account_id, hash) );
CREATE INDEX idx_ad_assets_user_created ON ad_assets(user_id, created_at); CREATE INDEX idx_ad_assets_user_page ON ad_assets(user_id, page_id); CREATE INDEX idx_ad_assets_user_provider_account ON ad_assets(user_id, provider, ad_account_id);
